creator: jjasen@gmail.com
text:
We have quite a few core files to play with, don't worry.


(kgdb) bt
#0  0xffffffff80c1b91e in doadump (textdump=<optimized out>) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:414
